yogurt-pudding-with-caramel-teleculinari.name: Yogurt Pudding With Caramel

ingredients.item: 2  iogurtes naturais ou com aroma a gosto ((120 g cada))

instructions: Bring to the fire a large and wide pot with water and let it boil. Bar a pudding form with the caramel.

Lay the eggs in the blender cup, add the condensed milk, yogurts and milk, turn it on and let it hit well. Then pour in shape, cover well, place inside the pot with the water in the heat and let cook for 50 minutes. Turn off the fire and let the pudding cool in the water.
Then take it to the fridge, deform it and serve it fresh.
